Project Case Study

Project: Custom Mantel Installation in Chattanooga TN

Location: Chattanooga TN. Service: Mantels. Fireplace mantel installation with hidden steel support and proportion-matched detailing for a remodeled great room.

Project Overview

Fireplace mantel installation with hidden steel support and proportion-matched detailing for a remodeled great room.

Scope of Work

  • Verified substrate and fireplace clearances
  • Prepared reinforced wall mount points
  • Installed and leveled solid wood beam mantel
  • Applied finish touch-up and final reveal alignment

Materials Used

  • Solid alder beam
  • Hidden steel reinforcement
  • Fireplace-rated clearances
  • Hand-rubbed oil finish

Before and After

Before, the fireplace lacked a visual anchor and looked underscaled. After, the custom mantel established a strong focal point with clean proportions.
